====Pokémon====
This listing is of Wulfric's Pokémon in the Pokémon Adventures manga.
{{anchor|Avalugg 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wulfric
|pkmn=Avalugg
|type1=Ice
|img=Wulfric Avalugg Adventures.png
|epnum=PS579
|epname=Pyroar Breathes
|desc={{p|Avalugg}} is Wulfric's first known Pokémon. It was used as sea transportation to Geosenge Town, where Team Flare's base was located. After arriving, it helped keep the ultimate weapon from opening with its weight. With the help of Valerie's {{p|Mr. Mime}}, it was able to stand on the air, but was knocked off by Bryony's {{p|Bisharp}}.

None of Avalugg's moves are known.}}

{{anchor|Abomasnow 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Wulfric
|pkmn=Abomasnow
|type1=Grass
|type2=Ice
|img=Wulfric Abomasnow Adventures.png
|epnum=PS579
|epname=Pyroar Breathes
|desc={{p|Abomasnow}} is Wulfric's second known Pokémon. It was first sent out at Geosenge Town to keep the ultimate weapon from opening as it was being unearthed. Later, it helped repair the damage done by the ultimate weapon firing on Kalos.

None of Abomasnow's moves are known.}}
